message:
fix(polyfills): fix Buffer, zlib, querystring issues and add comprehensive tests

Buffer fixes:
- Add padding for base64url decoding
- Convert strings to Buffer before native indexOf/lastIndexOf calls
- Add fill() method supporting strings and byte patterns

Zlib fixes:
- Wire up native compression module correctly via _modules.compression
- Try inflateZlib first for zlib-wrapped data (0x78 header)

Querystring fixes:
- Add URL decoding in parse function via decodeURIComponent
- Add array support in stringify function

Add 11 new comprehensive polyfill test files covering:
buffer_advanced, crypto_advanced, dns, events, fs, http, net, os, stream, timers, tls

Test results: 1318 passed, 1 expected failure (compression size test
due to Zig stored blocks limitation)
